instructions_for_checker: For each item, return one status: '✅' (planned/handled in site-plan), '⚠️' (partially handled, justify), '❌ N/A' (not applicable, justify). Output a JSON object {item_id: {status: '✅|⚠️|❌', justification: '<1 line>'}}. Never leave any item unanswered.

items.label: Mobile-first responsive design (320px → 1920px)
Design tokens defined (colors, typography, spacing, radius)
OKLCH color space for brand palette
Dark mode decision argued (yes/no with rationale)
Typography: max 2 font families, modular scale in rem
Smooth scroll (Lenis) wrapping the layout
Hero section: orchestrated entrance animation (GSAP/Framer)
Scroll-triggered animations on at least one section per route
Micro-interactions on all interactive elements
GPU-only animations (transform + opacity) — no left/top/width animated
@media (prefers-reduced-motion) reduces or removes animations
Custom cursor on desktop, hidden on pointer:coarse
Marquee component if client logos / references present
Navbar: mobile-first hamburger, accessible, scroll-progressive reveal
Footer with legal links and revoke-cookies trigger
Indexation BLOCKED in Phase 3 — robots.txt + X-Robots-Tag + meta robots
Unique <title> per page with brand suffix
Unique meta description per page (130-160 chars)
<link rel='canonical'> on every route
Open Graph tags (og:title, og:description, og:image 1200x630)
Twitter Card tags
JSON-LD schema.org Organization OR LocalBusiness on layout
JSON-LD schema.org Service per service page (if applicable)
Primary keyword defined per page (long-tail for secondary pages)
Search intent (informational/transactional/navigational) per route
Internal linking plan documented
next-sitemap configured (file present, NOT submitted to GSC)
<html lang='xx'> set correctly
Single H1 per page, expressing benefit (not description)
Heading hierarchy H1 > H2 > H3 respected
Image alt attributes meaningful (not decorative-only)
WCAG AA color contrast ratio ≥ 4.5:1 for body text
WCAG AA color contrast ratio ≥ 3:1 for UI components and large text
Skip nav link to #main-content
Focus-visible ring on all interactive elements
Keyboard navigation works for all flows (no mouse-only)
ARIA labels on icon-only buttons
Form labels associated (htmlFor / aria-labelledby)
Form errors announced (aria-invalid, aria-describedby)
Mobile nav: trap focus when open, aria-expanded set
Cookie banner: keyboard accessible, trap focus, escape closes
axe-core 0 critical errors required at delivery
Lang attributes on foreign words/quotes if applicable
Exactly one <main> landmark per rendered page (owned by [lang] or root layout)
Exactly one <footer>/contentinfo landmark per page, sibling of <main> (not child)
<html lang> dynamic from route params, no SSR/client mismatch (no hardcoded 'en' in multilingual sites)
page.tsx files contain no <main>, <footer>, <header>, <html>, <body> (layout-only)
All token pairs (fg,bg) used in components pass WCAG AA contrast (validated by @hermes-tokens-contrast-validator)
No console.error / console.warn / pageerror at runtime (verified by phase-audit AXIS 9)
Lighthouse Performance ≥ 90 (mobile)
LCP ≤ 2.5s (Largest Contentful Paint)
CLS ≤ 0.1 (Cumulative Layout Shift)
INP ≤ 200ms (Interaction to Next Paint)
Hero image: priority={true}, width/height set
next/image used everywhere (no raw)
Fonts via next/font with display: swap
Heavy non-critical components dynamic() with ssr:false
@vercel/analytics + @vercel/speed-insights wired in layout.tsx
Lazy-load below-fold images (loading='lazy' default)
No render-blocking resources beyond critical fonts
Bundle size monitored (build output check)
Brand voice/tone defined in site-plan §6.1
Voice/tone consistent with visual tone (§4.4 vs §6.1)
H1 expressed as benefit, not description
CTA text uses active verbs (not 'Learn more', 'Click here')
Microcopy for forms: helper text, error states, success states
Placeholders explicitly marked <!-- TODO --> if client content missing
Headlines respect target persona vocabulary (no jargon for B2C local)
Social proof elements present (testimonials, logos, counters)
Page meta descriptions hand-written, not auto-generated
